name: Twinkling Watermelon
overview: A CODA (child of deaf adult) student born with a gift for music crash lands at an unfamiliar place after time traveling through a suspicious music shop. There, he forms the band Watermelon Sugar with other mysterious youths.

trailers.title: [Trailer] Viu Original, Twinkling Watermelon | Coming to Viu FREE this 25 Sep!
